Item Name: 4 Rivers – Smokehouse Hot BBQ Sauce; Multi-Regional Flavor With an Ideal Combination of Our Signature With an Extra Layer of Heat. No High Fructose Corn Syrup. Perfect Complement For Beef, Pork, and Poultry. 16 fl oz
Bullet Point 1: 4 RIVERS SIGNATURE TASTE – Like all of our sauces, our founder, John Rivers, personally blended the 4R Hot BBQ Sauce to bring together the favorite flavors of the South. Similar to the 4R Signature BBQ Sauce with an extra layer of heat, his multi-regional recipe provides an ideal combination of sweet and savory with a smoky, spicy finish that complements pork, chicken and beef. No matter your cooking method, 4R Hot BBQ Sauce is engineered to bring out the best in your food.
Bullet Point 2: MULTI-REGIONAL FLAVOR -- The beauty of barbecue lies in its diversity of flavors. That’s why John Rivers created his 4R Hot BBQ Sauce to honor the best regional barbecue traditions. Whatever your preference – Kansas City, Memphis, the Carolinas, or Texas – our Hot BBQ Sauce’s complex flavors give you a uniquely premium, house-made sauce for every occasion.
Bullet Point 3: BARBECUE HOW IT SHOULD BE -- We at 4R believe that only quality ingredients can create quality food. All our 4R products are made in house with love and expertise, using the best ingredients available. It’s what sets 4R apart.
Bullet Point 4: BARBECUE MINISTRY – Founded in 2009 by John Rivers in Winter Park, Florida, 4R believes in quality people, quality ingredients, and quality food. What began as a charitable fundraiser for a young woman with a terminal illness has become the most beloved barbecue restaurant in Florida. Our Barbecue Ministry is dedicated to supporting the community, impacting lives, and providing the best tasting food, bar none. Join the family, and taste the difference for yourself.
Product Description: The 4 Rivers Smokehouse Hot Barbecue Sauce takes our classic Signature Sauce and kicks it up a notch. Our best-selling BBQ and grilling sauce integrates the flavors and spice of Southern barbecue, giving you a taste of home wherever home may be. At 4R we understand the value of flavor, which is why we dedicated years to perfecting a BBQ sauce recipe that will complement and add excitement to pork, beef, and chicken. Bring out the best in your barbecue with 4 Rivers.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium positioning with a focus on artisanal craftsmanship, regional flavor diversity, and founder-created recipes. The sauce emphasizes quality ingredients and a multi-regional, spicy profile, suggesting a niche appeal within the BBQ sauce market. The absence of high-fructose corn syrup and handcrafted branding contribute to a mid-to-high price tier, justifying its value as a specialty product for barbecue enthusiasts.

Its Delish Herbs Of Provence, 2 Oz Bag.

Herbes de Provence (French pronunciation: ?[??b.d?.p??.v??s]) is a mixture of dried herbs typical of the Provence region of southeast France. Herbs de Provence are used to flavor grilled foods such as fish and meat, as well as vegetable stews. The mixture can be added to foods before or during cooking or mixed with cooking oil prior to cooking so as to infuse the flavor into the cooked food.
